features.title: Everything you need to track expiry dates
features.description: Powerful features designed to help you manage product expirations effortlessly.

items.title: Expiry Tracking
items.description: Track all your product expiration dates in one centralized dashboard.

items.title: Smart Reminders
items.description: Get notified before products expire so you never waste anything.

items.title: Barcode Scanning
items.description: Quickly add products by scanning barcodes with your phone camera.

items.title: Product History
items.description: View your complete product history and consumption patterns.

items.title: Notification Alerts
items.description: Customizable alert schedules - daily, weekly, or per product.

items.title: Category Management
items.description: Organize products by category for easy browsing and filtering.
